## 项目技术栈与包管理

| 项目 | 结论 |
|------|------|
| **框架** | **Next.js `14.2.18`**（`package.json` 中 `next` 与 `eslint-config-next` 均为该版本） |
| **语言** | **TypeScript**（存在 `tsconfig.json`，`include` 为 `**/*.ts`、`**/*.tsx`；`allowJs: true` 表示也允许 JS，但主应用为 TS） |
| **包管理器** | **npm**（根目录存在 **`package-lock.json`**；无 `yarn.lock`、`pnpm-lock.yaml`） |

---

## 完整 `package.json` 内容

路径：`/Users/aiden/Desktop/GuanWang/package.json`

```json
{
  "name": "flyingnets-website",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev -H 0.0.0.0",
    "build": "next build",
    "clean": "rm -rf .next node_modules/.cache",
    "rebuild": "npm run clean && npm run build",
    "start": "node server.js",
    "start:next": "next start -H 0.0.0.0",
    "serve": "npm run build && npm run start",
    "ready": "test -f data/content.json || npm run db:seed; npm run serve",
    "orbstack": "docker compose up -d --build",
    "preview": "bash run-preview.sh",
    "local": "bash run-local.sh",
    "lint": "next lint",
    "db:seed": "node scripts/seed-data.js"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "bcryptjs": "^2.4.3",
    "framer-motion": "^11.11.17",
    "jsonwebtoken": "^9.0.2",
    "lucide-react": "^0.460.0",
    "next": "14.2.18",
    "nodemailer": "^6.9.16",
    "react": "^18.3.1",
    "react-dom": "^18.3.1",
    "react-hook-form": "^7.53.2",
    "rss-parser": "^3.13.0",
    "zustand": "^5.0.1"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/bcryptjs": "^2.4.6",
    "@types/jsonwebtoken": "^9.0.7",
    "@types/node": "^22.9.0",
    "@types/react": "^18.3.12",
    "@types/react-dom": "^18.3.1",
    "autoprefixer": "^10.4.20",
    "eslint": "^8.57.1",
    "eslint-config-next": "14.2.18",
    "postcss": "^8.4.49",
    "tailwindcss": "^3.4.15",
    "typescript": "^5.6.3"
  }
}
```

---

## `lib/` 目录文件列表

根路径：`/Users/aiden/Desktop/GuanWang/lib/`

- `auth.ts`
- `content.ts`
- `email.ts`
- `store.ts`
- `sync.ts`
- `i18n/contentTranslations.ts`
- `i18n/translations.ts`
- `i18n/useLocalizedContent.ts`
- `i18n/useTranslations.ts`

（共 9 个文件：`lib/` 下 5 个，`lib/i18n/` 下 4 个。）

---

## Azure / Microsoft Graph 集成

- **依赖与代码**：`package.json` 中**没有** `@azure/*`、`@microsoft/microsoft-graph-client`、`@azure/msal-*` 等；在 `*.ts`、`*.tsx`、`*.json` 中按包名搜索 **无匹配**。
- **实际内容**：仅在**文案/种子数据**里提到 Azure、M365、Microsoft 安全等（例如 `scripts/seed-data.js`、`lib/store.ts`、`lib/i18n/*.ts`、`app/layout.tsx`），属于业务描述，**不是**对 Azure API 或 Microsoft Graph 的程序化集成。

---

## 相关配置（摘要）

| 文件 | 路径 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| Next 配置 | `/Users/aiden/Desktop/GuanWang/next.config.js` | `reactStrictMode: true`；`images.remotePatterns` 含 Unsplash、Wikimedia、Clearbit |
| TypeScript | `/Users/aiden/Desktop/GuanWang/tsconfig.json` | 严格模式；路径别名 `@/*` → 项目根；Next 插件 |
| 锁文件 | `/Users/aiden/Desktop/GuanWang/package-lock.json` | 与 npm 配套 |
